title: Task Ticket Schema
description: Schema for defining tickets before execution in TDD or implementation phases.

title.description: The name of the ticket (e.g., Ticket-01: Authentication Module)

phase.description: The current TDD or development phase

inputs.description: Prerequisite files, features, or context required to start the task

outputs.description: The expected files to be created or modified

constraints.description: Architectural rules, forbidden actions, or boundary constraints

definition_of_done.description: Checklist items that must be checked off before the task is considered complete (e.g. Sensors, Tests)
